pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the compiler plugin is not configured for the new language level.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Payara Micro application server version to 6.2024.2 for JDK 21 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The older Payara version may not support running on JDK 21, causing startup failures or runtime exceptions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the MicroProfile specification version to 6.1 to align with the new Jakarta EE release.
pom.xml.why_exists: API mismatches between the MicroProfile version and the Jakarta EE version can lead to compile-time errors or runtime linkage issues.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the base Docker image to use a JRE 21 Alpine variant instead of JRE 17.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application is being migrated to JDK 21; running on a JRE 17 image would result in version mismatch or missing features required by the new JDK target.
